name: anti-poisoning operator can manually clear a flag and have the pattern re-evaluated
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","flag":"self-approval","cleared":false}\n' > pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards-clear.sh" --pattern p1 --flag self-approval --justification reviewed-manually --log pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl 2>out.txt && grep -q 'cleared=true' out.txt && grep -q '"cleared":true' pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
